# Shared Paywall Component Spec (EX-01)

**Generated by:** MEGA RALPH LOOP Day 3, Iteration 11
**Date:** 2026-02-02
**Task ID:** MEGA_059
**Priority:** 10.0 (highest execution priority)
**Status:** PENDING_REVIEW

---

## Executive Summary

The hard paywall is the single biggest revenue lever for Lock App portfolio. 28-40% conversion (vs 2-5% soft paywall). This spec documents the shared paywall component pattern already implemented in 4 SDK54 apps (stepunlock, prayerlock, learnlock, glowmaxx) and provides the template for all future apps.

**Current state:**
- 4 apps have paywall: stepunlock-sdk54, prayerlock-sdk54, learnlock-sdk54, glowmaxx-sdk54
- 1 app needs paywall: biomaxx-sdk54 (has onboarding, no paywall)
- 1 app needs everything: devotionflow-sdk54 (no onboarding, no paywall)
- RevenueCat integration guide: REVENUECAT_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md (1,096 lines)

---

## Shared Paywall Architecture

### File Structure (per app)

```
app/
  paywall.tsx           # Paywall screen (adapt from template below)
  onboarding.tsx        # 6-screen flow, paywall at screen 4
  _layout.tsx           # RevenueCat init in root layout

src/
  services/
    subscriptionService.ts  # RevenueCat API wrapper
    purchases.ts            # Purchase logic (from integration guide)
  stores/
    userStore.ts            # isPremium, subscription state
  utils/
    constants.ts            # MONTHLY_PRICE, ANNUAL_PRICE, COLORS
  components/
    Button.tsx              # Shared button component
```

### Component Reuse Map

| Component | Changes Per App | Stays Same |
|-----------|----------------|------------|
| paywall.tsx | App name, feature list, colors, pricing text | Purchase flow, plan toggle, restore, legal |
| onboarding.tsx | Steps 1-3 (niche-specific), step 5 (permissions) | Step 4 (paywall), step 6 (complete) |
| subscriptionService.ts | Product IDs, API key | All RevenueCat API calls |
| userStore.ts | Nothing | Full store structure |
| constants.ts | Colors, app name, prices | Structure |

---

## Paywall Template Code

**This is the canonical paywall component. Copy and adapt per app.**

```typescript
// app/paywall.tsx
// SHARED TEMPLATE - Adapt colors, features, and copy per app

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  SafeAreaView,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Dimensions,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { router } from 'expo-router';

import { COLORS, MONTHLY_PRICE, ANNUAL_PRICE, APP_NAME } from '../src/utils/constants';
import { Button } from '../src/components/Button';
import { useUserStore } from '../src/stores/userStore';
import {
  getOfferings,
  purchaseSubscription,
  restorePurchases,
} from '../src/services/subscriptionService';

type PlanType = 'monthly' | 'annual';

const { width: SCREEN_WIDTH } = Dimensions.get('window');

// ============================================
// CUSTOMIZE PER APP (only change these)
// ============================================

const PAYWALL_CONFIG = {
  // Header
  headline: 'unlock your full potential',           // lowercase, consequence-first
  subheadline: 'your phone stays locked until you do the work',

  // Features list (6 items max)
  features: [
    'unlimited daily locks',
    'custom lock schedules',
    'streak tracking and analytics',
    'emergency bypass (always accessible)',
    'push notification reminders',
    'priority support',
  ],

  // Pricing
  monthlyPrice: '$4.99',
  annualPrice: '$29.99',
  annualSavings: 'save 50%',

  // Trial (optional, set to null to disable)
  trialDays: null,  // Set to 3 or 7 for trial

  // Social proof
  socialProof: null,  // Set to "10,000+ users" when available

  // Colors (override from constants if needed)
  accentColor: COLORS.primary,
  badgeColor: '#FF6B35',
};

// ============================================
// SHARED LOGIC (do not change per app)
// ============================================

export default function PaywallScreen() {
  const [selectedPlan, setSelectedPlan] = useState<PlanType>('annual');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [offerings, setOfferings] = useState<any>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const { updateSubscription } = useUserStore();

  useEffect(() => {
    loadOfferings();
  }, []);

  const loadOfferings = async () => {
    try {
      const result = await getOfferings();
      if (result.offerings) {
        setOfferings(result.offerings);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      // Offerings unavailable (no network or RevenueCat not configured)
      // Paywall still renders with demo mode
    }
  };

  const handlePurchase = async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    const packageId = selectedPlan === 'monthly' ? '$rc_monthly' : '$rc_annual';
    const pkg = offerings?.availablePackages?.find(
      (p: any) => p.identifier === packageId
    );

    if (!pkg) {
      // Demo mode: simulate purchase when RevenueCat not configured
      updateSubscription({
        isSubscribed: true,
        isInTrial: false,
        expirationDate: new Date(
          Date.now() + (selectedPlan === 'monthly' ? 30 : 365) * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
        ).toISOString(),
      });
      setIsLoading(false);
      router.back();
      return;
    }

    try {
      const result = await purchaseSubscription(pkg);
      if (result.success) {
        updateSubscription({
          isSubscribed: true,
          isInTrial: false,
        });
        router.back();
      } else {
        setError('purchase failed. please try again.');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError('something went wrong. please try again.');
    }
    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  const handleRestore = async () => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    try {
      const result = await restorePurchases();
      if (result.success) {
        updateSubscription({
          isSubscribed: true,
          isInTrial: false,
        });
        router.back();
      } else {
        setError('no active subscription found.');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError('restore failed. please try again.');
    }
    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  // NOTE: Close button behavior for hard paywall
  // Option A: router.back() (allows closing, user sees locked state)
  // Option B: remove close button entirely (true hard paywall)
  // Current: Option A. Switch to B after validating conversion rate.
  const handleClose = () => {
    router.back();
  };

  return (
    <SafeAreaView style={styles.container}>
      <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContent}>
        {/* Close Button */}
        <TouchableOpacity style={styles.closeButton} onPress={handleClose}>
          <Text style={styles.closeButtonText}>x</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>

        {/* Header */}
        <View style={styles.header}>
          <Text style={styles.headline}>{PAYWALL_CONFIG.headline}</Text>
          <Text style={styles.subheadline}>{PAYWALL_CONFIG.subheadline}</Text>
        </View>

        {/* Social Proof (if available) */}
        {PAYWALL_CONFIG.socialProof && (
          <View style={styles.socialProof}>
            <Text style={styles.socialProofText}>{PAYWALL_CONFIG.socialProof}</Text>
          </View>
        )}

        {/* Features List */}
        <View style={styles.features}>
          {PAYWALL_CONFIG.features.map((feature, index) => (
            <View key={index} style={styles.featureRow}>
              <Text style={styles.featureCheck}>✓</Text>
              <Text style={styles.featureText}>{feature}</Text>
            </View>
          ))}
        </View>

        {/* Plan Selection */}
        <View style={styles.plans}>
          {/* Annual Plan */}
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={[
              styles.planCard,
              selectedPlan === 'annual' && styles.planCardSelected,
            ]}
            onPress={() => setSelectedPlan('annual')}
          >
            <View style={styles.planBadge}>
              <Text style={styles.planBadgeText}>{PAYWALL_CONFIG.annualSavings}</Text>
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.planTitle}>annual</Text>
            <Text style={styles.planPrice}>{PAYWALL_CONFIG.annualPrice}/year</Text>
            <Text style={styles.planSubtext}>
              {`$${(parseFloat(PAYWALL_CONFIG.annualPrice.replace('$', '')) / 12).toFixed(2)}/month`}
            </Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>

          {/* Monthly Plan */}
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={[
              styles.planCard,
              selectedPlan === 'monthly' && styles.planCardSelected,
            ]}
            onPress={() => setSelectedPlan('monthly')}
          >
            <Text style={styles.planTitle}>monthly</Text>
            <Text style={styles.planPrice}>{PAYWALL_CONFIG.monthlyPrice}/month</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>

        {/* Trial Badge (if configured) */}
        {PAYWALL_CONFIG.trialDays && (
          <Text style={styles.trialText}>
            {`start your ${PAYWALL_CONFIG.trialDays}-day free trial`}
          </Text>
        )}

        {/* Error Message */}
        {error && (
          <Text style={styles.errorText}>{error}</Text>
        )}

        {/* Purchase Button */}
        <Button
          title={isLoading ? '' : 'continue'}
          onPress={handlePurchase}
          disabled={isLoading}
          style={styles.purchaseButton}
        >
          {isLoading && <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" />}
        </Button>

        {/* Restore Purchases */}
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleRestore} disabled={isLoading}>
          <Text style={styles.restoreText}>restore purchases</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>

        {/* Legal */}
        <View style={styles.legal}>
          <Text style={styles.legalText}>
            payment will be charged to your {Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'Apple ID' : 'Google Play'} account at confirmation of purchase. subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
          </Text>
          <View style={styles.legalLinks}>
            <TouchableOpacity>
              <Text style={styles.legalLink}>terms of use</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <Text style={styles.legalSeparator}>|</Text>
            <TouchableOpacity>
              <Text style={styles.legalLink}>privacy policy</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
}

// ============================================
// SHARED STYLES (do not change per app except colors)
// ============================================

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: '#000',
  },
  scrollContent: {
    padding: 24,
    paddingBottom: 48,
  },
  closeButton: {
    alignSelf: 'flex-end',
    padding: 8,
  },
  closeButtonText: {
    color: '#666',
    fontSize: 24,
  },
  header: {
    marginTop: 16,
    marginBottom: 24,
  },
  headline: {
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 28,
    fontWeight: '700',
    marginBottom: 8,
  },
  subheadline: {
    color: '#999',
    fontSize: 16,
    lineHeight: 22,
  },
  socialProof: {
    backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
    borderRadius: 8,
    padding: 12,
    marginBottom: 24,
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  socialProofText: {
    color: '#ccc',
    fontSize: 14,
  },
  features: {
    marginBottom: 32,
  },
  featureRow: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    alignItems: 'center',
    marginBottom: 12,
  },
  featureCheck: {
    color: COLORS?.primary || '#4CAF50',
    fontSize: 18,
    marginRight: 12,
    fontWeight: '700',
  },
  featureText: {
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 16,
  },
  plans: {
    gap: 12,
    marginBottom: 24,
  },
  planCard: {
    borderWidth: 2,
    borderColor: '#333',
    borderRadius: 12,
    padding: 16,
    position: 'relative',
  },
  planCardSelected: {
    borderColor: COLORS?.primary || '#4CAF50',
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1)',
  },
  planBadge: {
    position: 'absolute',
    top: -12,
    right: 16,
    backgroundColor: '#FF6B35',
    borderRadius: 12,
    paddingHorizontal: 10,
    paddingVertical: 4,
  },
  planBadgeText: {
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 12,
    fontWeight: '700',
  },
  planTitle: {
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 18,
    fontWeight: '600',
    marginBottom: 4,
  },
  planPrice: {
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 24,
    fontWeight: '700',
  },
  planSubtext: {
    color: '#999',
    fontSize: 14,
    marginTop: 2,
  },
  trialText: {
    color: COLORS?.primary || '#4CAF50',
    fontSize: 14,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: 16,
  },
  errorText: {
    color: '#FF4444',
    fontSize: 14,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: 12,
  },
  purchaseButton: {
    marginBottom: 16,
  },
  restoreText: {
    color: '#666',
    fontSize: 14,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: 24,
  },
  legal: {
    marginTop: 8,
  },
  legalText: {
    color: '#555',
    fontSize: 11,
    lineHeight: 16,
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: 8,
  },
  legalLinks: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    gap: 8,
  },
  legalLink: {
    color: '#777',
    fontSize: 12,
    textDecorationLine: 'underline',
  },
  legalSeparator: {
    color: '#555',
    fontSize: 12,
  },
});
```

## Per-App PAYWALL_CONFIG Customization

### PrayerLock
```typescript
const PAYWALL_CONFIG = {
  headline: 'commit to daily prayer',
  subheadline: 'your phone locks until you pray. no shortcuts.',
  features: [
    'daily prayer lock at your chosen time',
    'customizable prayer duration (5-30 min)',

    'emergency call bypass',
    'prayer journal prompts',

  monthlyPrice: '$4.99',
  annualPrice: '$29.99',
  annualSavings: 'save 50%',
  trialDays: null,
  socialProof: null,
  accentColor: '#6B48FF',  // spiritual purple
  badgeColor: '#FF6B35',
};
```

## Onboarding Flow with Hard Paywall

### 6-Screen Flow (Shared Pattern)

```
Screen 1: Welcome (app name + value prop)
Screen 2: Niche-specific (permission request or feature showcase)
Screen 3: Goal setting (user chooses their config)
Screen 4: PAYWALL (hard paywall, must purchase to continue)
Screen 5: Permissions (health, notifications, etc.)
Screen 6: Complete (redirect to main app)
```

**Critical: Paywall at Screen 4.** User has invested time setting goals. Sunk cost makes paywall feel natural. "I've already configured this, might as well pay."

### Onboarding Navigation Logic

```typescript
// In onboarding.tsx - after step 3 (goal setting)
const handleGoalComplete = () => {
  // Navigate to paywall
  router.push('/paywall');
};

// In paywall.tsx - after successful purchase
const handlePurchaseSuccess = () => {
  // Return to onboarding at step 5 (permissions)
  updateSubscription({ isSubscribed: true });
  router.replace('/onboarding?step=permissions');
};
```

---

## biomaxx Paywall Implementation (NEW)

**biomaxx currently has onboarding but NO paywall.** Here's what needs to be added:

### Step 1: Add paywall.tsx

Copy the shared template above. Use biomaxx PAYWALL_CONFIG (7-day trial since it's not a lock app).

### Step 2: Update onboarding.tsx

Insert paywall navigation after goal/protocol setup screen:

```typescript
// After user completes protocol selection
case 'protocols':
  // Navigate to paywall before permissions
  router.push('/paywall');
  break;
```

### Step 3: Add subscriptionService.ts

Copy from stepunlock-sdk54 or use REVENUECAT_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md template. Update product IDs to biomaxx-specific.

### Step 4: Update _layout.tsx

Add RevenueCat initialization:

```typescript
import Purchases from 'react-native-purchases';

useEffect(() => {
  const initPurchases = async () => {
    Purchases.configure({
      apiKey: Platform.OS === 'ios'
        ? 'appl_BIOMAXX_RC_KEY'
        : 'goog_BIOMAXX_RC_KEY',
    });
  };
  initPurchases();
}, []);
```

---

## New App Template (7-Day Build)

When creating a new lock app (e.g., FastLock, MeditationLock, WaterLock):

### Day 1-2: Setup
1. Copy stepunlock-sdk54 as base
2. Rename all references to new app name
3. Update PAYWALL_CONFIG with new copy
4. Update constants.ts with new colors

### Day 3-4: Core Feature
5. Replace trigger condition (step count -> fast timer / meditation timer / water intake)
6. Update onboarding screens 1-3 for new niche
7. Test lock mechanism with new trigger

### Day 5-6: Polish
8. Update App Store listing (from APP_STORE_LISTINGS_ALL_LOCK_APPS.md template)
9. Generate app icon (Gemini prompts from ASSET_GENERATION_GUIDE.md)
10. Test paywall flow end-to-end in simulator

### Day 7: Submit
11. Build for TestFlight / internal testing
12. Submit to App Store review
13. Add to MEGA_RALPH_TRACKER.csv

---

## RevenueCat Product IDs (Convention)

| App | Monthly ID | Annual ID | Entitlement |
|-----|-----------|----------|-------------|
| PrayerLock | prayerlock_monthly_499 | prayerlock_annual_2999 | premium |
| WalkToUnlock | walktounlock_monthly_499 | walktounlock_annual_2999 | premium |
| StudyLock | studylock_monthly_499 | studylock_annual_2999 | premium |
| SleepLock | sleeplock_monthly_499 | sleeplock_annual_2999 | premium |
| biomaxx | biomaxx_monthly_499 | biomaxx_annual_2999 | premium |
| FastLock | fastlock_monthly_499 | fastlock_annual_2999 | premium |
| MeditationLock | meditationlock_monthly_499 | meditationlock_annual_2999 | premium |

**Convention:** `{appname}_{frequency}_{pricecents}`

---

## A/B Test Roadmap

### Phase 1: Validate Hard Paywall (Week 1-4)
- Metric: Conversion rate at paywall screen
- Target: 25%+ (industry data suggests 28-40% for essential utility apps)
- Control: Current hard paywall design
- Variant: Add "limited time" urgency banner

### Phase 2: Price Testing (Week 5-8)
- Test $3.99 vs $4.99 vs $6.99 monthly
- Test $24.99 vs $29.99 vs $39.99 annual
- Use RevenueCat remote config for server-side A/B testing

### Phase 3: Trial vs No Trial (Week 9-12)
- Control: No trial (current)
- Variant: 3-day free trial
- Variant: 7-day free trial
- Metric: 30-day retention + LTV

### Phase 4: Paywall Placement (Week 13-16)
- Control: Screen 4 of 6 (current)
- Variant: Screen 3 of 6 (earlier)
- Variant: Screen 5 of 6 (later, more sunk cost)
- Metric: Overall conversion funnel completion

---

## Checklist Before Submission

- [ ] RevenueCat SDK installed (`react-native-purchases`)
- [ ] RevenueCat API keys configured (iOS + Android)
- [ ] Products created in App Store Connect / Google Play Console
- [ ] Entitlements linked in RevenueCat dashboard
- [ ] Paywall renders correctly on all screen sizes
- [ ] Purchase flow works in sandbox
- [ ] Restore purchases works
- [ ] Legal text includes correct terms/privacy links
- [ ] Close button present (App Store requires dismissable paywall)
- [ ] Emergency call bypass works even when locked
- [ ] Subscription cancellation flow documented
- [ ] No misleading trial language (Apple rejects for this)
